title: selaginella selangorensis
intro: Selaginella selangorensis, also known as Selangor spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that grows in tropical regions, often found in shaded areas with high humidity. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Selaginella selangorensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, and also promote overall well-being.
